title: Sunni Hadith Pack (Arabic)
summary: Official HadeethEnc Arabic pack for cited offline Sunni hadith lookup.
install_steps: download the remote archive after explicit user action
verify sha256 before import into the local hadith database
keep displayed hadith text verbatim from the installed pack
